## Checklist

- [ ] I've read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] My change fits the project's scope (single-user CLI, manual posting, minimal deps)
- [ ] I've added/updated docs if behavior changed
- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or PII in the diff
- [ ] If this is a security fix, I've also followed [SECURITY.md](../SECURITY.md) for any disclosure
